case_title: IONIN, IRENE vs. CHEUNG, C.C. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING AND ENTERING DEFAULT JUDGMENT BEFORE 5/20/96. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $120.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, C.C.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IONIN, IRENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG, C.C. $2,193.09 PRINCIPAL, $247.00 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.09
